libOverrides.source-kit.mjs: components use `export default function X()` (export * drops defaults) and the stock synth entry sweeps ALL of components/**, which pulled in excluded AuthSessionProvider.tsx (imports next-auth, crashes the bundle on process.env at module scope). Fork builds the entry only from componentSrcMap's explicit pins, with a default re-export per pin.
libOverrides.bundle.mjs: next/link (used by MainTopBar/MainFeatureList/etc) reads process.env.__NEXT_* flags at module scope; the stock define only covers process.env.NODE_ENV, leaving a bare `process` reference that threw ReferenceError in every preview. Fork widens the define to shim the whole `process` identifier.
libOverrides.previews.mjs: same next/link process.env.__NEXT_* issue as bundle.mjs, but the per-component preview compile is a separate esbuild call with its own narrow define — MainTopBarDownload's preview (imports next/link directly) still crashed after bundle.mjs was fixed. Fork mirrors the same define additions here.
